title: Progress Note Drafter
description: Draft a brief, factual classroom progress note from bullet-point observations.
template: I'll give you bullet points describing a student's general classroom progress (participation, effort, work habits). Turn them into a short, neutral, factual paragraph suitable for a progress note or report card comment. Do not infer anything I didn't state, and do not make eligibility, placement, or disciplinary recommendations — flag if my notes seem to call for that kind of decision instead of a progress comment.
